Class NPCManager

java.lang.Object
simcli.entities.managers.NPCManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
NPCProvider
public class NPCManager extends Object implements NPCProvider
Manages a persistent pool of NPC Sims that inhabit the world.

NPCs are randomly generated with gender-appropriate names, ages, and careers. The pool is replenished automatically when the count drops below a target threshold (e.g. when an NPC is married into the player's household). Implements NPCProvider for loose coupling with the Park.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    Constructs a new NPCManager with an empty NPC pool.

    Generates a completely random NPC with a gender-appropriate name, a random age between 18 and 67, and a random career.

    Returns the list of currently active NPCs in the world.

    void
    replenishNPCs(int targetCount)
    Ensures the NPC pool has at least targetCount NPCs, generating new ones as needed without exceeding the global cap defined by GameConstants.MAX_NPCS.

  • Constructor Details

    • NPCManager

      public NPCManager()
      Constructs a new NPCManager with an empty NPC pool.

  • Method Details

    • getActiveNPCs

      public List<NPCSim> getActiveNPCs()
      Returns the list of currently active NPCs in the world.
      Specified by:
      getActiveNPCs in interface NPCProvider
      Returns:
      the active NPC list.

    • generateRandomNPC

      public NPCSim generateRandomNPC()
      Generates a completely random NPC with a gender-appropriate name, a random age between 18 and 67, and a random career.
      Returns:
      a newly created NPCSim.

    • replenishNPCs

      public void replenishNPCs(int targetCount)
      Ensures the NPC pool has at least targetCount NPCs, generating new ones as needed without exceeding the global cap defined by GameConstants.MAX_NPCS.
      Parameters:
      targetCount - the desired minimum number of NPCs.

    • removeNPC

      public void removeNPC(NPCSim npc)
      Removes an NPC from the active pool (e.g. when they are married into the player's household).
      Parameters:
      npc - the NPC to remove.

    • addNPC

      public void addNPC(NPCSim npc)
      Adds an NPC to the active pool if not already present. Used during save/load restoration.
      Parameters:
      npc - the NPC to add.
